title: ACP.md frontmatter — agentacp/v1
description: JSON Schema for the YAML frontmatter of an AIP-44 ACP.md manifest. AIP-44 is a profile of the upstream Agent Client Protocol at agentclientprotocol.com — top-level fields describe a runtime's role/transport/conformance, and AIP-44-specific bindings live under metadata.aip44.* so upstream ACP runtimes preserve them verbatim.

name.description: Kebab id, MUST equal the parent directory name.

id.description: Stable runtime id used for cross-references.

version.description: Semver of this manifest (independent from upstream ACP version).

kind.description: client = drives a subprocess agent; server = exposes an operator; bridge = both.

transport.description: stdio (REQUIRED), websocket (OPTIONAL but RECOMMENDED for remote use).

aip44Extensions.description: AIP-44-specific bindings. Upstream ACP runtimes preserve unknown metadata.* keys verbatim, so these survive end-to-end.

acp_rev.description: Commit SHA of the agentclientprotocol/agent-client-protocol repository this manifest validates against.

tier.description: Capability tier shorthand. basic = session/{new,prompt,update} only; governance-aware = + loadSession + tool-call streaming; sandboxed = + mcpCapabilities + sandbox profile.

capabilities.description: Optional explicit capability map. When present, overrides tier defaults.

operator.description: Workspace-relative ref to the AIP-9 OPERATOR.md this server exposes. REQUIRED when kind=server.

governance.description: Optional ref to AIP-7 GOVERNANCE.md. Defaults to the operator's governance binding.

sandbox.description: Ref to AIP-36 SANDBOX.md. REQUIRED when tier=sandboxed.

audit.description: Optional audit log target override. Defaults to the governance binding's log.

mcp_servers.description: Optional list of MCP server refs the runtime mounts via session/new.mcpServers.

capabilities.description: Mirror of upstream ACP initialize capabilities. Omitted keys MUST be treated as unsupported.
